title: Ophrys atargatis
taxonomy: Ophrys atargatis is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Ophrys. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Ophrys atargatis is further categorized as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than on other plants. The species is native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Mediterranean. As a member of the orchid family, Ophrys atargatis is also classified as a type of monocot plant.
